findings.evidence: `rg -n "condexp-pair-law|pair-law|CondExpPairLaw" roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/Exchangeability` has no hits; relevant roadmap hits are `README.md:429` for `the directing-measure bridge` and `README.md:601` for `finite-product factorization`, while the new file says at lines 14-17 that the lemma is consumed by de Finetti block-product factorisation.
findings.fix: Update the roadmap claim to cite the concrete target, e.g. `TauCetiRoadmap/Exchangeability/README.md` Layer 3 `the directing-measure bridge` or Layer 6 `finite-product factorization`, and state this lemma as a prerequisite for that target.
findings.issue: The new theorem has plausible roadmap fit, but the PR description does not identify a valid roadmap node/heading; `condexp-pair-law` is not present in the Exchangeability roadmap.

summary: The PR is a single coherent conditional-expectation helper with a real path to the Exchangeability de Finetti/directing-measure milestones, but the roadmap claim names a non-roadmap target id instead of the actual roadmap node or heading.
